properties.query:
let timeRange = 10m;
let watchlist_DS_WAF_005 = _GetWatchlist("watchlist_DS_WAF_005");
AzureDiagnostics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeRange)
| where ruleName_s !in (watchlist_DS_WAF_005)
| where ResourceType in ("FRONTDOORS", "PROFILES")
| where action_s == "Block"
| where isnotempty( clientIP_s)
|summarize by clientIP_s,requestUri_s, ruleName_s
properties.description: Detección de trafico denegado en waf por reglas
